nasb.text: And He went a little beyond them, and fell to the ground and began to pray that if it were possible, the hour might pass Him by.

esv.text: And going a little farther, he fell on the ground and prayed that, if it were possible, the hour might pass from him.

cnv.text: 耶穌稍往前走，俯伏在地上禱告：如果可能的話，使那時刻不要臨到他。

ccb.text: 耶稣往前走了不远，俯伏在地祷告，如果可以，不要让那时刻临到祂。

csbs.text: 耶稣稍往前走，俯伏在地，祷告说，如果有可能，让那时刻离开他。
